text: Standing at the threshold between a quiet, modern hallway and the vibrant, intellectual space beyond its glass doors, I feel a sense of anticipation. The bold colors and illuminated signage ahead invite curiosity. Entering the R+D (Research and Development) area, I am immediately struck by the intentional design and the promise of new ideas. There’s an energy here—one of exploration, innovation, and reflection. My sense of self sharpens: I am both observer and participant in humanity’s quest for progress, inspired yet contemplative about the delicate interplay between technology and our inner world.
